faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about {brand}
faqPage.noResults: No FAQs found matching your search.

whatIs.question: What is OpenToolsKit?
whatIs.answer: OpenToolsKit is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. It offers 95+ professional tools for editing, converting, merging, splitting, and securing PDF files without uploading them to any server.

isFree.question: Is OpenToolsKit really free?
isFree.answer: Yes, OpenToolsKit is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.

account.question: Do I need to create an account?
account.answer: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use OpenToolsKit. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.

uploaded.question: Are my files uploaded to a server?
uploaded.answer: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.

safe.question: Is it safe to use OpenToolsKit with sensitive documents?
safe.answer: Yes, OpenToolsKit is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.

storage.question: What happens to my files after processing?
storage.answer: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.

operations.question: What PDF operations can I perform?
operations.answer: OpenToolsKit offers 95+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.

merge.question: Can I merge multiple PDF files?
merge.answer: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.

images.question: Can I convert images to PDF?
images.answer: Yes, OpenToolsKit supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.

edit.question: Can I edit text in a PDF?
edit.answer: OpenToolsKit provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.

browsers.question: What browsers are supported?
browsers.answer: OpenToolsKit works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.

sizeLimit.question: Is there a file size limit?
sizeLimit.answer: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.

slow.question: Why is processing slow for large files?
slow.answer: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.

offline.question: Does OpenToolsKit work offline?
offline.answer: Currently, OpenToolsKit requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.

supported.question: What languages are supported?
supported.answer: OpenToolsKit is available in 13 locales: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).

change.question: How do I change the language?
change.answer: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.

aboutPage.title: About {brand}
aboutPage.description: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} ГўвӮ¬вҖң a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.
mission.p2: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
mission.p3: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.

fast.title: Fast & Efficient
fast.description: Powered by modern web technologies, OpenToolsKit delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.

accessible.title: Accessible Everywhere
accessible.description: Available in 13 locales and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: OpenToolsKit is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.

technology.title: Built with Modern Technology
technology.description: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:

list.indexeddb: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work

technology.summary: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.

faqPage.title: Perguntas Frequentes
faqPage.subtitle: Encontre respostas para as perguntas mais comuns sobre o {brand}

whatIs.question: O que ГғВ© o OpenToolsKit?
whatIs.answer: O OpenToolsKit ГғВ© um conjunto de ferramentas PDF gratuito e focado na privacidade que funciona inteiramente no seu navegador. Ele oferece mais de {count} ferramentas profissionais para editar, converter, mesclar, dividir e criptografar arquivos PDF sem nunca enviГғВЎ-los para um servidor.

isFree.question: O OpenToolsKit ГғВ© realmente gratuito?
isFree.answer: Sim, o OpenToolsKit ГғВ© totalmente gratuito. NГғВЈo hГғВЎ taxas ocultas, assinaturas premium ou obrigatoriedade de registro. Todos os recursos estГғВЈo disponГғВӯveis para todos.

account.question: Preciso criar uma conta?
account.answer: NГғВЈo, vocГғВӘ nГғВЈo precisa criar uma conta ou se registrar para usar o OpenToolsKit. Basta visitar o site e comeГғВ§ar a usar qualquer ferramenta imediatamente.

uploaded.question: Meus arquivos sГғВЈo enviados para um servidor?
uploaded.answer: NГғВЈo, seus arquivos nunca sГғВЈo enviados para um servidor. Todo o processamento de PDF ГғВ© feito localmente no seu navegador usando JavaScript e WebAssembly. Seus arquivos nunca saem do seu dispositivo.

safe.question: ГғвҖ° seguro usar o OpenToolsKit para documentos sensГғВӯveis?
safe.answer: Sim, o OpenToolsKit foi projetado com a privacidade como prioridade. Como todo o processamento ocorre localmente no seu navegador, seus documentos sensГғВӯveis permanecem no seu dispositivo e nunca sГғВЈo transmitidos pela Internet.

storage.question: O que acontece com meus arquivos apГғВіs o processamento?
storage.answer: Seus arquivos sГғВЈo armazenados temporariamente na memГғВіria do seu navegador durante o processamento. Assim que vocГғВӘ fecha a aba do navegador ou sai da pГғВЎgina, todos os dados dos arquivos sГғВЈo apagados automaticamente. NГғВіs nГғВЈo armazenamos nenhum de seus arquivos.

operations.question: Quais operaГғВ§ГғВөes de PDF posso realizar?
operations.answer: O OpenToolsKit oferece mais de {count} ferramentas, incluindo: mesclar, dividir, comprimir, converter (de/para imagens, texto, JSON), editar, anotar, assinar, adicionar marcas d'ГғВЎgua, criptografar/descriptografar, OCR e muito mais.

merge.question: Posso mesclar vГғВЎrios arquivos PDF?
merge.answer: Sim, vocГғВӘ pode mesclar vГғВЎrios arquivos PDF em um sГғВі. Use a ferramenta Mesclar PDF, envie seus arquivos, organize-os na ordem desejada e clique em Mesclar.

images.question: Posso converter imagens em PDF?
images.answer: Sim, o OpenToolsKit suporta a conversГғВЈo de vГғВЎrios formatos de imagem (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) para PDF. VocГғВӘ pode converter uma ou vГғВЎrias imagens de uma vez.

edit.question: Posso editar o texto de um PDF?
edit.answer: O OpenToolsKit oferece ferramentas de anotaГғВ§ГғВЈo e ediГғВ§ГғВЈo que incluem destaque, adiГғВ§ГғВЈo de texto, formas, imagens e assinaturas. Para ediГғВ§ГғВЈo completa de texto, a ferramenta Editor de PDF fornece funcionalidades abrangentes de anotaГғВ§ГғВЈo.

browsers.question: Quais navegadores sГғВЈo suportados?
browsers.answer: O OpenToolsKit funciona em todos os navegadores modernos, incluindo Chrome, Firefox, Safari e Edge. Recomendamos o uso da versГғВЈo mais recente do seu navegador para uma melhor experiГғВӘncia.

sizeLimit.question: Existe um limite de tamanho de arquivo?
sizeLimit.answer: A maioria das ferramentas suporta arquivos de atГғВ© 100 MB, e ferramentas como Mesclar e Comprimir suportam atГғВ© 500 MB. Esses limites garantem um desempenho fluido no navegador.

slow.question: Por que o processamento ГғВ© lento com arquivos grandes?
slow.answer: Como todo o processamento ГғВ© feito no navegador, o desempenho depende das capacidades do seu dispositivo. Arquivos grandes exigem mais memГғВіria e poder de processamento. Para melhores resultados, feche outras abas e aplicativos.

offline.question: O OpenToolsKit funciona offline?
offline.answer: Atualmente, o OpenToolsKit requer uma conexГғВЈo com a Internet para carregar o aplicativo inicialmente. No entanto, uma vez carregado, o processamento de PDF ocorre localmente e nГғВЈo requer conexГғВЈo.

supported.question: Quais idiomas sГғВЈo suportados?
supported.answer: O OpenToolsKit estГғВЎ disponГғВӯvel em 9 idiomas: InglГғВӘs, JaponГғВӘs, Coreano, Espanhol, FrancГғВӘs, AlemГғВЈo, ChinГғВӘs, PortuguГғВӘs e ГғВҒrabe (com suporte para leitura da direita para a esquerda).

change.question: Como posso mudar o idioma?
change.answer: VocГғВӘ pode mudar o idioma usando o seletor de idiomas no topo da pГғВЎgina. Sua preferГғВӘncia serГғВЎ salva para suas prГғВіximas visitas.

cta.title: Need public support?
cta.description: Use the support page for source links, AGPL attribution, and GitHub issue reporting.

aboutPage.title: Sobre {brand}
aboutPage.description: {brand} is an open-source browser tool platform that launches with {count}+ PDF tools, a workflow editor, and public source distribution.

mission.title: Nossa MissГғВЈo
mission.p1: We believe private browser tools should stay accessible, inspectable, and useful beyond a single file format. That is why {brand} has been shaped into a broader browser-tool platform.
mission.p2: Unlike traditional services that depend on remote processing for routine document work, {brand} keeps core flows in the browser where applicable and keeps source availability visible through a public AGPL repository.
mission.p3: The current public site focuses on PDF tools, workflow editing, and source-visible browser utilities while preparing the platform for additional tool families.

privacy.title: Privacidade em Primeiro Lugar
privacy.description: Seus arquivos nunca saem de seu dispositivo. Todo o processamento ocorre localmente no seu navegador, garantindo total privacidade e seguranГғВ§a.

fast.title: RГғВЎpido e Eficiente
fast.description: Impulsionado por tecnologias web modernas, o OpenToolsKit oferece processamento de PDF extremamente rГғВЎpido sem a necessidade de uploads ou downloads.

accessible.title: AcessГғВӯvel em Qualquer Lugar
accessible.description: DisponГғВӯvel em 9 idiomas e funciona em qualquer dispositivo com um navegador moderno. Nenhuma instalaГғВ§ГғВЈo necessГғВЎria.

free.title: Gratuito para Sempre
free.description: O OpenToolsKit ГғВ© totalmente gratuito para usar, sem custos ocultos, sem necessidade de registro e sem limites de uso.

openSource.title: CГғВіdigo Aberto
openSource.description: ConstruГғВӯdo com transparГғВӘncia em mente. Nosso cГғВіdigo ГғВ© de cГғВіdigo aberto, permitindo que qualquer pessoa verifique nossas reivindicaГғВ§ГғВөes de privacidade.

community.title: Guiado pela Comunidade
community.description: Desenvolvido com o feedback de usuГғВЎrios de todo o mundo. Melhoramos continuamente com base em suas necessidades.

technology.title: ConstruГғВӯdo com Tecnologia Moderna
technology.description: O {brand} ГғВ© construГғВӯdo usando tecnologias web de ponta para garantir a melhor experiГғВӘncia possГғВӯvel:

list.nextjs: <strong1>Next.js</strong1> - Para renderizaГғВ§ГғВЈo de pГғВЎgina rГғВЎpida e amigГғВЎvel para SEO
list.wasm: <strong1>WebAssembly</strong1> - Para desempenho de processamento de PDF quase nativo
list.workers: <strong1>Web Workers</strong1> - Para processamento em segundo plano sem bloqueio
list.pdflib: <strong1>pdf-lib & PDF.js</strong1> - Bibliotecas de manipulaГғВ§ГғВЈo de PDF padrГғВЈo da indГғВәstria
list.indexeddb: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - Para armazenamento local seguro do seu trabalho

technology.summary: This stack supports browser tools, static export, local processing, and public-source trust surfaces without forcing a server-bound editing model.

cta.title: Pronto para ComeГғВ§ar?
cta.description: Explore {count}+ tools and see how {brand} handles private browser workflows.

hero.title: Support & Source
hero.description: Use email for general support and GitHub for developer-facing issues, source access, and AGPL attribution.

email.title: Source Code
email.description: Inspect the public repository for the live service.
